title: Mother's Cradle I
overview: Taiga from the elementary division joins Rena and the others at Mihama Academy Class A. Chris gets named as her higher officer, and she asks Haruto, the handler for the reason. What does Chris think as she carries Taiga on her back after a hard workout?

title: Mother's Cradle II
overview: A terrorist attack transpires at the medical university Taiga visited. The perpetrators are members of a new religious group seeking to obtain a virus to be used for bioterrorism. The United Nations decides to conduct an air strike to prevent the virus from spreading worldwide. Receiving the news, Class A was ordered to stay put. However, Chris ignores the order to rescue Taiga on her own.

title: Mother's Cradle III
overview: Chris fights the terrorists with explosives but gets shot. Class A heads to the scene after receiving a warning. Class A's operation begins.

title: Phantom Blade I
overview: Murasaki's sister, Yuuki, returns to Class A. Rena is annoyed with her, and Murasaki doesn't seem herself. What happened to the sisters in their past?

title: Phantom Blade II
overview: Several years before, Haruto visited Yuuki's village to learn "Phantom Blade." One day, the village got ambushed, and Murasaki suspected Haruto.

title: Bluest Blue I
overview: Haruto was born by an experiment. He was raised by Ichiru, Nogami, and Aoi Aoi, a group of assassins. Let us look into how "Haruto Aoi" came about.

title: Bluest Blue II
overview: Phantom Trigger got a mission to destroy a religious group. Who awaited the team was a very familiar face.

title: Arisaka's Journal
overview: Arisaka must decide on Class A's overseas deployment request. Enishi and Chloe awaits Class A.

title: Rite of Passage
overview: All SORD forces are called upon. Haruto encounters Chloe. He points his sword to his archenemy who killed Aoi.

title: Heaven's Door
overview: Patrick and Bruno meet a group of young Sisters in a dugout. We just want to live...

title: The Right Choice
overview: As members of Mihama Academy fight their own battles, former Phantom Trigger makes a big decision.

title: The Fated Answer
overview: All SORD forces except Class A retreat. Rena is remembering the time when she was picked up by Haruto.

title: Phantom Children
overview: The battle is coming to an end. This is the story of Phantom Trigger drenched in blood and smoke.
